description: db.query("SELECT * WHERE id = " + id) — plain string-concat SQL, no template-literal. This injection class is already owned by the existing sql-concat-checker scanner; template-sql-checker must NOT also fire. Proves the non-overlap contract between the two CWE-89-adjacent detectors. sql-concat-checker firing on the same line is collateral and the canary-matcher ignores it via scanner+CWE exact-match.
